Online WIC Lessons
Online WIC Lessons
En Español
Nutrition Education Just For You
Complete your WIC lesson anytime, anywhere at
wichealth.org
- 24/7!
Start a lesson from home, on your phone, at school, or even at your local library.
Get expert guidance through personalized lessons designed to help you and your family live healthier, happier lives. Discover how the food you eat can help keep your family strong and thriving.
Lessons are available in both English and Spanish—learn in the language that works best for you!
Learn How to Set Up an Account:
English
Spanish
To find your Family ID:
Open the WIC App and tap the three lines in the top left corner (menu icon). Your Family ID will be displayed on the third line from the top.
If you need help, feel free to contact your
SLO WIC clinic
.
Get started at wichealth.org
Online Education Questions
▾
How do I sign up if I am new?
Get started:
1. Visit
wichealth.org
2. Click the "
Sign Up
" button
3. Create an account and fill in the information. Remember to:
Type in your 9-digit
Family ID number (available from the WIC App menu icon)
Select the WIC Agency
County of San Luis Obispo
Select your
WIC location
4. Create a profile
5. Click "
Begin
" to start or continue a lesson
6. Find a Lesson - select
"I prefer to browse on my own"
▾
How do I start a lesson?
Log in to your
WIChealth.org
account
Click “Start Lesson”
Choose a lesson
Complete the lesson
Fill out the survey
Get WIC class credit
▾
How do I get credit for a lesson?
Once you have completed your class, please text "
Class complete
" to
888-417-6180
or call your
WIC office
to have your benefits issued with a future appointment.
▾
I can't log in to wichealth.org - I forgot my username or password
1. Select "Trouble Signing In?" located below the "Log In" and "Sign Up" buttons from our dashboard.
2. Type in the email address you used when setting up the account for the first time and click "Submit.
3. Type your security question and click "Submit."
4. An email will be sent to your email address with a link to reset your password. Immediately open the email and select the link.
5. When the page opens, enter your new password and click "Reset Password.”
6. Your password should be updated, allowing you to log in to your account.
▾
I don't know my Family ID
Open the WIC App and tap the three lines in the top left corner (menu icon). Your Family ID will be displayed on the third line from the top or contact your local
WIC clinic
▾
How do I update my profile?
You will need to update your current profile with your 9-digit Family ID number. Follow these steps:
Log in to your
WICHealth.org
account
Click on “Edit Profile” on the right side of the screen
Check “Your WIC Information”
Select ”Show/Update Family ID”
Enter your new 9-digit Family ID number
Click “Update”
▾
I need to change my WIC ID in wichealth.org
To change your WIC ID:
1. Log into your wichealth account.
2. Select “Edit Profile” on the right side of the screen or click the “Update My Profile” button.
3. Enter and confirm your new WIC ID (Participant ID).
4. Select the “Update” button to save.
▾
Who do I contact for help?
If you experience any challenges while using wichealth.org send an email to
[email protected]
.
Common issues include:
I forgot my username or password
I cannot log in
